emails.subject: ERV
emails.body: Kam Keiser suggested that I email you regarding ERV publishing access. I am taking over the East desk from her and I need to be able to publish the trading track books to ERV. Please shout with any questions or concerns. Thanks. PL 3-7376

emails.subject: RE: ERV
emails.body: RE: ERV Hi Philiip, I've granted you access to publish the Trading Track reports. If you don't already have the "Executive Report Publisher" add-ins in your excel applications, please call me and I can walk you through the process. Anita 36753 To: Luong, Anita

emails.subject: RE: ERV
